title: Sprites, Groups, Update Contracts, Kill Semantics, and Entity Ownership
description: Sprites add themselves to global groups, update signatures differ, draw order depends on set iteration, killed objects keep external references, and restart doubles group membership. Learners cumulatively produce reconciled sprite and group lifecycle through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define image, rect or FRect, world position, update inputs, draw responsibility, and lifecycle for every Sprite subtype.
Use separate update, draw-layer, collision, projectile, hazard, and UI groups only when ownership and membership are explicit.
Keep group update inputs consistent or route context through an explicit system boundary.
